discoveries.name: thClaws/thClaws
discoveries.description: Open-source AI agent harness in native Rust — GUI, CLI, headless, and webapp from one binary. Multi-provider, MCP, skills, plugins, agent teams.

discoveries.name: Gitlawb/zero
discoveries.description: The coding agent that answers to you, your model, your machine, your rules.

discoveries.name: kennss/SiliconScope
discoveries.description: Sudoless Apple Silicon system monitor (native SwiftUI GUI) with ANE / Media Engine / memory-bandwidth tracking

discoveries.name: AtomicBot-ai/atomic-agent
discoveries.description: Local First Ai Agent. Optimized for Local Ai models. Long context window. Proper tools callings. Runs privately on your device.

discoveries.name: deepanwadhwa/samosa-chat
discoveries.description: Run Qwen3.6-35B-A3B locally on a 16 GB RAM machine

releases.notes: What's Changed New interactive agent experience: running `ollama` now launches an agent to help you code and delegate work
koboldcpp-1.117.1 Fixed terminal output sometimes not showing thinking traces
What's Changed Add AGENTS.md by @comfyanonymous in https://github.com/Comfy-Org/ComfyUI/pull/14696

discoveries.name: r14dd/patent
discoveries.description: A prior-art search for your code ideas — has this dev tool already been shipped?

discoveries.name: giannisanni/pulsar
discoveries.description: SSD-streaming inference engine for giant MoE models (Rust + CUDA). GLM 5.2 743B at 2 tok/s and Hy3 295B at 7 tok/s on two consumer 16GB GPUs. Zero-config multi-GPU: measures PCIe bandwidth, places attention and hot experts where they fit.

discoveries.name: bbarit/bbarit-agent-oss
discoveries.description: Open-source AI coding agent for your terminal — one Rust binary, 15+ LLM providers, 1,000+ models. A self-hostable Claude Code / Codex CLI alternative (MIT).
